name: Foolproof Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chocolate pudding according to the package instructions.
2. Gently fold the cooled pudding into the Cool Whip or whipped cream until combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until set.
4. Serve chilled.
Notes from Brett Jones: "...first, you get something that tastes
almost exactly like the real thing and second, it always sets (unless
you add too much whipped cream!) and is rarely grainy.
Variations: Swirl a little raspberry jam through it or add your
favorite liqueur.
